breakdown: Rockport Walking Test formula: 132.853 - 0.0769 * weight - 0.3877 * age + 6.315 * gender - 3.2649 * walkTime - 0.1565 * heartRate
Compare result with normative values based on age and gender to assess cardiovascular fitness.
